<div class="infobox infobox-character">
<div class="infobox-title">{{{name|{{PAGENAME}}}}}</div>
<table class="infobox-data">
{{#if:{{{race|}}}|<tr><th>Race</th><td>{{{race}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{culture|}}}|<tr><th>Culture</th><td>{{{culture}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{birth|}}}|<tr><th>Born</th><td>{{{birth}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{death|}}}|<tr><th>Died</th><td>{{{death}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{titles|}}}|<tr><th>Titles</th><td>{{{titles}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{weapon|}}}|<tr><th>Weapon</th><td>{{{weapon}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{realm|}}}|<tr><th>Realm</th><td>{{{realm}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{spouse|}}}|<tr><th>Spouse</th><td>{{{spouse}}}</td></tr>}}
{{#if:{{{affiliation|}}}|<tr><th>Affiliation</th><td>{{{affiliation}}}</td></tr>}}
</table>
</div><noinclude>
Character infobox template. Usage:
<pre>
{{Infobox character
| name =
| race =
| culture =
| birth =
| death =
| titles =
| weapon =
| realm =
| spouse =
| affiliation =
}}
</pre>
[[Category:Templates]]
</noinclude>
